title: evolvulus helianthemoides
intro: Evolvulus helianthemoides, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze or Beach Morning Glory, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Evolvulus helianthemoides include the potential to treat various conditions such as fever, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Evolvulus helianthemoides is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
